calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Donna Marie Auguirre.
Dept: 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:40 a.m.

Adam Brumage, Esq. appeared for plaintiff CITIBANK, N.A.
Martin Kokoska, Vice President and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Brumage and Kokoska appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Donna Marie Auguirre.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts (Open Book, Account Stated and Money Lent) was filed on October 7, 2019.
Defendant Donna Marie Auguirre's General Denial to the plaintiff's complaint was filed on Octrober 17, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on May 22, 2020, setting trial for October 5, 2020.
Due the Global Pandemic trial in this matter was continued seven times, most recently from January 31, 2022 to today, February 14, 2022.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief, Memorandum of Costs and Witness & Exhibit Lists were filed on October 14, 2021.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

Plaintiff CITIBANK, N.A. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Application................................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Translated Application - Spanish to English................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Account Statements.........................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 4: Translated Account Statements - Spanish to English.........................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff CITIBANK, N.A., and against defendant Severiano M. Morales, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $3,353.05.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $290.00.
Total - $3,643.05.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 10:47 a.m.
